hero.headline: Craft brands people
hero.description: A ten-piece team of strategists, designers and marketers building brands that are beautifully made and quietly effective.
hero.imageAlt: Creative team collaborating around a table

about.heading: A small studio with a sharp point of view.
about.story: Ten Piece was founded in 2019 by a group of ex-agency creatives who wanted to work more closely, and more honestly, with founders. Today we're ten people — strategists, designers, writers and paid-media specialists — working with clients across Europe and North America.
about.mission: To make thoughtful, measurable marketing accessible to the ambitious teams that need it most.
about.vision: A world where brand and performance aren't opposing disciplines — they're the same craft.

values.title: Craft first
values.description: Every deliverable earns its place. No filler, no fluff.

values.title: Plain-spoken
values.description: We say what we mean and back it with data you can read.

values.title: Long-view
values.description: We build systems your brand can grow into for years.

about.imageAlt: Studio team in a bright workspace

projects.title: Rewriting the category for a modern skincare brand
projects.challenge: A cluttered category with no clear voice and stalling repeat orders.
projects.solution: Rebuilt the brand around a single editorial idea and rewired the funnel to match.

projects.title: A B2B rebrand that finally sounded like the team
projects.challenge: A confident engineering team hidden behind generic B2B messaging.
projects.solution: New positioning, identity system and website launched in ten weeks.

projects.title: Turning a local roaster into a national favourite
projects.challenge: Great product, thin margins, no content engine.
projects.solution: Content and social pipeline plus a subscription-first shop redesign.

projects.title: Scaling paid without breaking the brand
projects.challenge: Aggressive paid targets threatening a carefully-built brand voice.
projects.solution: Modular creative system letting performance test without eroding identity.

faqs.question: How does the €50 pricing actually work?
faqs.answer: Each of our six services is offered at a fixed €50 rate for a defined scope of work. If you bundle all six, the package price is €270 — a €30 saving over buying each individually.

faqs.question: Who will I actually work with?
faqs.answer: You'll work directly with senior members of our ten-person studio. No account managers between you and the people doing the work.

faqs.question: How long does a typical project take?
faqs.answer: Individual services are delivered within two weeks. The full package runs on a coordinated six-to-eight-week schedule.

faqs.question: What industries do you specialise in?
faqs.answer: We've done our strongest work in SaaS, DTC, hospitality and wellness — but we take on any category where craft and clarity matter.

faqs.question: Do you offer ongoing retainers?
faqs.answer: Yes. After a first project we often move clients onto a monthly retainer scoped around their goals.

faqs.question: Can I order just one service?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Every service is designed to stand alone at €50, though most clients get compounding value from combining several.

faqs.question: What's your revision policy?
faqs.answer: Two rounds of revisions are included in every service. Additional rounds are scoped transparently.

faqs.question: How do I get started?
faqs.answer: Use the Start a project button. Pick your services, tell us about your business, and we'll be in touch within one working day.

finalCta.heading: Let's make something worth remembering.
finalCta.description: Every project starts with a short conversation. No pitch decks, no pressure — just a look at whether we're the right studio for you.

contact.heading: Tell us what you're building.
contact.description: Send us a note about your project, your goals and your timeline. We'll reply within one working day with next steps.
